releaseNotes: Removed the always-on system-tray icon — the close button now exits directly, no more "minimize to tray" prompt. Form fields in Add Server / Add Model dialogs now keep their theme colors when Chromium tries to autofill (no more blue text on yellow). Model Nexus replaces "Doubao 豆包" with "Volcengine 火山引擎" pointing at volcengine.com — the actual ByteDance model-service portal. App Manager's right-panel "Default" badge is bigger and simpler (renamed from "Restore Default").
